question: What prompted each feature?
title: Feature reasoning
summary: Features exist because of specific conversations—not because a template said they should.

scenes.headline: Every feature here has a parent conversation.
scenes.body: The ideas list, status field, and priority sort each began as a human intent, was implemented by AI, and left a reasoning trail in .vibekb/. That is what “feature timeline” means—not a changelog, but preserved intent.

scenes.label: Ideas CRUD — week 1 origin
scenes.description: The minimum loop that justified the entire project.

steps.title: The prompt
steps.text: “Dead-simple place to stash SaaS ideas I might build on weekends.”

steps.title: What shipped
steps.text: Create, list, edit, delete with title and notes only.

steps.title: What we refused
steps.text: Tags, attachments, sharing links, accounts—each rejected and recorded.

steps.title: Still the test
steps.text: Does this help one person review their own ideas? If not, it waits.

cards.title: Status field (month 1)
cards.teaser: Separate exploring from pursuing without a workflow engine.
points: Dangerous to add states without migration + forms

cards.title: Priority sort (month 2)
cards.teaser: Manual order because automatic ranking implies false confidence.
points: Do not add AI scoring without a product decision

cards.title: Export (discussed, not built)
cards.teaser: CSV export planned; triggered PostgreSQL debate.

scenes.label: Dependency relationships
scenes.description: What each feature assumes still true.

steps.title: Ideas CRUD
steps.text: Depends on: SQLite schema, manual migrations, single operator.

steps.title: Status field
steps.text: Depends on: ideas CRUD, aligned save path, migration discipline.

steps.title: Priority sort
steps.text: Depends on: list query, sort_order column, no concurrent editors.
